name: one2novel
description: 从一句灵感到一本小说 — AI 驱动的长篇小说创作工作台

scripts.build: pnpm --filter @one2novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @one2novel/server build && pnpm --filter @one2novel/client build
scripts.typecheck: pnpm --filter @one2novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @one2novel/server typecheck && pnpm --filter @one2novel/client typecheck && pnpm --filter @one2novel/desktop typecheck
scripts.build:desktop:all: pnpm --filter @one2novel/shared build && pnpm --filter @one2novel/server prisma:generate && pnpm --filter @one2novel/server build && pnpm --filter @one2novel/client build:desktop && pnpm --filter @one2novel/desktop build
scripts.dist:desktop:nsis: pnpm run stage:desktop && node desktop/scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --win nsis --x64
scripts.dist:desktop:portable: pnpm run stage:desktop && node desktop/scripts/run-electron-builder.cjs --win portable --x64
